name: Google Sheets Assistant
description: Read, write, and analyze Google Sheets with AI-powered insights, formula generation, and data summarization. Powered by evolink.ai
author: EvoLinkAI

dataTransmission.gateway.maton.ai: All Google Sheets operations (read, write, create, format, etc.) are proxied through gateway.maton.ai, which manages OAuth tokens and forwards requests to the Google Sheets API.
dataTransmission.ctrl.maton.ai: Connection management (create, list, delete OAuth connections) is handled via ctrl.maton.ai.
dataTransmission.api.evolink.ai: When AI features (ai-analyze, ai-formula, ai-summary) are used, spreadsheet data is sent to api.evolink.ai for processing by Claude. No data is stored after the response is returned. AI features are optional and require explicit opt-in via EVOLINK_API_KEY.
